title: Gothic 1 Remake
desc: The Legend is Back - Return to the Valley of the Mines in this faithful remake of the genre-defining classic RPG. Explore a hand-crafted, organic open world that reacts dynamically to your actions in a gritty, unrestricted experience like no other.

title: Deep Crafter
desc: As a specially trained explorer in "Deep Crafter", you'll gather resources, design production lines, automate everything, and explore this vast, ocean-covered planet to uncover its secrets.

title: Ice Cream Simulator
desc: Run your dream ice cream shop in Ice Cream Simulator! Create delicious ice cream using a variety of ingredients, manage your business, hire staff, decorate your store, handle changing weather and different customers, and enjoy a relaxing first-person simulation experience.

title: Xeno Swarm
desc: "Xeno Swarm" is a hardcore side-scrolling shoot-'em-up game. Team up with your allies to battle overwhelming swarms of alien creatures, engage in life-or-death showdowns with colossal bosses on extraterrestrial battlefields, and relive the exhilarating thrill of bullet-hell mayhem!

title: Putrika 2nd.Cut: For the Exquisite Attire
desc: Is cutting down a young girl a sin, or a salvation? In the Haku-a Church where pure love and jealousy collide, a young gem-craftsman is forced to choose—to let her live, or to end her life.

title: Abyss Born
desc: Abyss Born is a single-player dark action RPG with survival and dungeon crawler elements. Fight various monsters, explore dangerous dungeons, trade with allies and complete quests to find a friend and face evil.

title: Wonder Warp
desc: An Alien Threat Has Emerged in the City of Cynosure! Run and gun through a series of mazes to defeat the monsters.

title: Follow Us
desc: A co-op horror game for 2 players, where you risk your life outside to entertain a world that never leaves home. On Follow Us, contestants work in pairs: one explores, the other guides. Trust is your lifeline.

title: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol. 2
desc: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!

title: Guinea Pig Runaway Together
desc: Two guinea pigs. One balloon. Endless chaos. Work together or get nowhere in this physics-based co-op parkour challenge!

title: A Week in Paradise
desc: A Week in Paradise is an interactive narrative mystery. Discover the unusual circumstances of your arrival to a bar called Paradise, and drink through the night with the bar's charismatic regular. Each night, unravel the threads holding back memories in your dreams.

title: Witch's Apocalyptic Journey
desc: Abyss decayed, witches awaken. As their guide, you will weave their destinies. Craft unique cards, schedule their days, shape endless possibilities through deckbuilding. Each choice will lead to different Ending...

title: Astral Lords
desc: Master the core "Combat × Base-Building" loop. Survive intense horde-clearing chaos with agile gunplay, then think like a strategist—build your economy and army in real-time. With diverse Commanders and endless builds, your choices shape each run.

title: Asphalt Racing Bundle 3 in 1
desc: Enjoy 3 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!

title: Shattered Chess
desc:
You only have 10 moves. Every capture counts for scoring.
Build huge combo chains, multiply your score, and push your run as far as possible.
Upgrade powerful passives, discover broken synergies, and survive bosses that completely twist the rules of the game.

title: Airport Security Sucks!
desc: Embody your inner power-tripping TSA agent and hunt down other players attempting to blend in and smuggle contraband past you. Control the crowd and your problematic K9 with authoritative voice commands, and use "compliance devices" to apprehend smugglers making mischief or hiding in plain sight.

title: Tactorius
desc: Tactorius is a spell-based chess roguelite. Over 100 unique spells and 9 new pieces change the game in ways subtle and explosive. Enter the Gauntlet, build your skill tree, and make every match your own.

title: Sinner Maker
desc: Sinner Maker allows you to create up to 100 characters and simulate a society built around them. Construct homes, manage their needs, and watch as they fall in love, form friendships, and even become enemies. Manage resources and solve emerging problems if you want your soul to be saved.

title: Kromex
desc: Conquer. Control. Dominate. A fast-paced, competitive territory game where every tile you claim brings you closer to victory, and every second of inattention can turn the tide completely.

title: Death Standing
desc:
Death Standing is the first of its kind 'Stand' type of game, where the player has to do nothing but hold still for a set amount of time. It's a meditative endurance challenge game where you have to hold the left mouse button without moving the mouse itself.

Who's going to give up first? Will Kojira-san drop the baby? Or will Death wrap it up for the day and go home?

title: Seals From the Frosty Bay
desc: Help the seal overcome the obstacles!

title: Steamboat Incident
desc: Trapped at sea on a steamboat - fix it, hide, and escape

title: Car Racing: Auto & Formula Sport
desc: No description available

title: Mega Man W
desc: Explore eight New Levels with an array of new Robot Masters! Augment Mega Man, and even Robot Master weapons, with different properties to suit your gameplay style! Collect CDS, earn Trophies, and fill out an Bestiary of enemies made by our development crew! Enjoy amazing original Compositions by MinobiVW, Marley Juaz, 40Nix, BastyArts. A Challenge Mode awaits with over 80+ challenges, and an all new endless mode where you can mix and match utilities from Mega Man's past adventures!

title: Defi's Devotion
desc:
Enter into a dark and ominous world has the form hand of an inspiring lich. The last step of your ritual is to claim your power and become immortal. With various powers at your disposal and more to claim, you will infect the living, corrupt their structures, and bring ruin to their world.
The folks of this land are guarded by a powerful Overseer who uses the simulated economy's output to summon heroes and protect the people. You must keep your phylactery safe while you feed it corpses and the very buildings they call home. Turn villagers to zombies, take direct control of them, and

title: Zaijian Eurydice
desc: No description available

title: D.U.M.B.E.R. Ducks
desc: The D.U.M.B. ducks are back for an Emergency Rescue!

title: Ball & Gun
desc: Ball & Gun is a genre-bending, Sports-FPS game where you master your jump shot and an evolving arsenal of divine weaponry to hold back the undead. This isn't just about survival; its about becoming a Basketball God in the Ballpocalypse. A ball. A gun. Zombies. This is the new definitive shooter.

title: John broke his bones
desc: Ragdoll physics platformer where you control a scientist to going through different labs with gadgets and hazards to get the medkit

title: Supermarket & Clothing Store Simulator
desc:
Build your business.
Grow your stores.
Become a retail legend.

title: Drawn Together
desc: Doodle, communicate, and play your own drawing games with friends using your own desktop digital whiteboards!

title: Arknights: Endfield - Update 1.3: Sketches of Lost Heirlooms
desc:
Version 1.3 of Arknights: Endfield, which includes:
• New Operators: Mi Fu and Camille
• New area: Sword Vault Dale
• New Main Story Content
• New game mode: Contingency Contract
• New events, missions, and rewards
